findings.evidence: Mathlib defines `ContinuousConstSMul` with only `[SMul Γ T]` and marks the additive pair with `attribute [to_additive] ContinuousConstSMul` in `Mathlib/Topology/Algebra/ConstMulAction.lean:60-74`; `Submonoid.smul_def` only assumes `[SMul M' α]` in `Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Submonoid/MulAction.lean:92-97`.
findings.fix: State it as `@[to_additive] instance ... [MulOneClass M] [SMul M X] [ContinuousConstSMul M X] (S : Submonoid M) : ContinuousConstSMul S X`, and similarly remove `[MulAction G X]` from the subgroup instance.
findings.issue: `Submonoid.continuousConstSMul` requires `[Monoid M] [MulAction M X]`, although `ContinuousConstSMul` only needs an `SMul` and `Submonoid` itself only needs `MulOneClass`; it also lacks the usual `to_additive` version for `ContinuousConstVAdd`.

summary: The diffeomorphism action API is at the expected level, but the new generic transfer instance is stated with unnecessarily strong action assumptions and omits the standard additive counterpart.
